CustomField.description: ContentDocumentId of a related NEPA document (e.g., links a Final EIS to its Draft EIS). Stored as Text because Salesforce does not permit Lookup fields targeting ContentDocument/ContentVersion. Maps to CEQ standard Related Document IDs property.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: ContentDocumentId of the related NEPA document (e.g., the Draft EIS this Final EIS responds to).
CustomField.label: Related Document ID
